Package de.uka.ilkd.key.rule

Interface VariableCondition

All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractOrInterfaceType, AlternativeVariableCondition, ApplyUpdateOnRigidCondition, ArrayComponentTypeCondition, ArrayLengthCondition, ArrayTypeCondition, ConstantCondition, ContainsAssignmentCondition, DifferentFields, DifferentInstantiationCondition, DropEffectlessElementariesCondition, DropEffectlessStoresCondition, EnumConstantCondition, EnumTypeCondition, EqualUniqueCondition, FieldTypeToSortCondition, FinalReferenceCondition, FreeLabelInVariableCondition, HasLoopInvariantCondition, InStrictFp, IsLabeledCondition, IsThisReference, JavaTypeToSortCondition, LocalVariableCondition, LoopFreeInvariantCondition, LoopInvariantCondition, LoopVariantCondition, MayExpandMethodCondition, MetaDisjointCondition, ModelFieldCondition, NewJumpLabelCondition, ObserverCondition, SameObserverCondition, SimplifyIfThenElseUpdateCondition, StaticFieldCondition, StaticMethodCondition, StaticReferenceCondition, StoreStmtInCondition, StoreTermInCondition, SubFormulaCondition, TermLabelCondition, TypeComparisonCondition, TypeCondition, VariableConditionAdapter
public interface VariableCondition
The instantiations of a schemavariable can be restricted on rule scope by attaching conditions on these variables. Such a condition is realized by a class which implements this interface. The usual place where to put these implementations is inside package de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.conditions. For variable conditions that know only black and white answers there exists a convenience class VariableConditionAdapter.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    MatchConditions
    check(SchemaVariable var, SyntaxElement instCandidate, MatchConditions matchCond, Services services)
    checks if the condition for a correct instantiation is fulfilled

  • Method Details

    • check

      MatchConditions check(SchemaVariable var, SyntaxElement instCandidate, MatchConditions matchCond, Services services)
      checks if the condition for a correct instantiation is fulfilled
      Parameters:
      var - the SchemaVariable to be instantiated
      instCandidate - the SVSubstitute (e.g. Term, ProgramElement) to be mapped to var
      matchCond - the MatchCondition with the current matching state and in particular the SVInstantiations that are already known to be needed
      services - the program information object
      Returns:
      modified match results if the condition can be satisfied, or null otherwise
